name: Lean / Jobs-to-be-Done
description: Problem-explore (fan) -> Problem-pick (waist) -> Solution-explore (fan + prototype) -> Validate (waist). Lean-startup framing around the customer's job-to-be-done.
when_to_use: When you want to anchor on the customer's job, find the highest-value problem, then validate a minimal solution.

steps.name: Problem Explore
steps.intent: Explore the jobs-to-be-done and the problems blocking them, broadly across customers.

steps.name: Problem Pick
steps.intent: Pick the single highest-value, most-underserved problem/job to solve first.

steps.name: Solution Explore
steps.intent: Explore solution/MVP candidates and build a minimal prototype.

steps.name: Validate
steps.intent: Personas use the MVP; validate the value proposition and converge to a buildable spec.
